title: Trial
description: Single trial execution record within a campaign. Written by writeTrialResult to results/<trialId>/result.json. Always includes schemaVersion and writtenAt. additionalProperties is false: runtime writers and verify fail closed on unknown fields. resultDigest covers the entire stored record except digests.resultDigest. resolvedModel is never invented from requestedModel; when unavailable, resolvedModel is null and resolvedModelAvailable is false. artifactDir may be recorded but evidence verify always digests campaign/artifacts/<trialId> and never trusts the stored path. Identity fields (id, experimentId, arm, provider, taskId, repetition, scheduleSeed, invocationPath, requestedModel, postureFingerprint) bind to the frozen manifest trial when verified with manifestTrial.

id.description: Must equal destination trialId; writeTrialResult always forces the safe destination id

provider.description: Provider id from the arm; always identity-bound to the frozen manifest row

requestedModel.description: Model id requested on the arm; null only when arm had no model (writeTrialResult default)

resolvedModel.description: Model id actually used after resolution, if known; never invented from requestedModel

resolvedModelAvailable.description: True only when resolvedModel was obtained from invoker/adapter evidence

resolvedModelSource.description: Evidence source for resolvedModel (e.g. model.resolved.value, invoker-explicit, unavailable, absent)

postureFingerprint.description: Posture fingerprint (64 hex) or null; always identity-bound to the frozen manifest row. Pattern applies only when a string is present.

classificationReason.description: Free-form classification note; sanitized export only keeps bounded identifiers

reasonCode.description: Bounded adapter/outcome reason code (export-safe when identifier-shaped)

outcomeKind.description: Adapter outcome.kind (e.g. success, timeout, provider_error, refusal)

digests.description: Evidence binding digests (required object). rawEvidenceUnavailable marks infra records without provider raw. resultDigest is stamped by writeTrialResult over the full stored record excluding itself.

rawEvidenceUnavailable.description: True when INFRA_FAIL path stored no raw provider artifacts (unavailable for report); still included in resultDigest envelope

exitCode.description: Invoker process exit code; null when the process never exited cleanly

executionRoot.description: External execution root for provider workspaces (outside campaign tree)

items.description: Gate evidence after stripGatePreviews (no stdout/stderr previews)

workspaceDir.description: Per-trial workspace path (external execution root); recorded but not used as digest authority

artifactDir.description: Recorded artifact path for humans/export; evidence verify always digests campaign/artifacts/<trialId> instead of this value

schemaVersion.description: Always stamped by writeTrialResult from SCHEMA_VERSION

writtenAt.description: Always stamped by writeTrialResult at write time
